query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bike_sizes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  bikeId INT NOT NULL,
  tamanho VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  quantidadeTotal INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  quantidadeDisponivel INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  dailyRate DECIMAL(10,2),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2uiJuwepBaepVjU.root --database 9oQjN6PX9fNMedgfErUfQE --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bike_sizes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  bikeId INT NOT NULL,
  tamanho VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  quantidadeTotal INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  quantidadeDisponivel INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  dailyRate DECIMAL(10,2),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
